2605.18031.title: Quantum Sidecar Architectures for Hybrid AI Training and Inference: Stateful Protected Registers, Stateless Reset-and-Reprepare Circuits and Quantum Weight-State Outlook
2605.18031.paper_summary: We propose a quantum sidecar architecture family for future hybrid AI training and inference. The central idea is not to store an entire Transformer in a small quantum memory, nor to claim one-shot collapse into a fully trained model or an optimal answer. Instead, we identify two physically distinct operating modes for quantum co-processors attached to classical large-model pipelines. The first is a stateful protected-register mode, in which a protected register stores a reusable quantum resource while an ancilla or temporary register performs QND-style readout. The second is a stateless reset-and-reprepare mode, in which each query prepares a task-conditioned quantum circuit, evolves over bounded training or inference control variables, measures candidate signals, resets the qubits, and repeats. We simulate the stateful mode using 2/4/6/8 protected-qubit density-matrix QND-style parity readout with one ancilla and a Qiskit cross-check. For the stateless mode, we include both an abstract candidate-update sampler and a circuit-level QAOA-style statevector sampler over structured candidate landscapes, followed by reset-overhead sensitivity analysis. The resulting framework positions quantum sidecars as bounded signal generators for optimizer-side sampling, adapter or expert selection, retrieval, routing, and reasoning-path proposal. As a speculative outlook, we introduce quantum weight-state sidecars: restricted quantum representations over model-control variables, not direct encodings of complete classical weight tensors.
2605.18031.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種量子副駕駛架構系列，用於未來的混合 AI 訓練和推理。<lb/>其核心思想不是將整個 Transformer 存儲在小型量子記憶體中，也不是聲稱一次性崩潰為完全訓練的模型或最佳答案。<lb/>相反，我們識別出兩種物理上不同的操作模式，用於附加在經典大型模型管道上的量子協處理器。<lb/>第一種是有狀態的保護寄存器模式，其中保護寄存器存儲可重用的量子資源，而輔助寄存器或臨時寄存器執行 QND 風格的讀出。<lb/>第二種是無狀態的重置和重新準備模式，其中每個查詢準備一個任務條件的量子電路，並在有限的訓練或推理控制變量上演變，測量候選信號，重置量子位，然後重複。<lb/>我們使用 2/4/6/8 個受保護量子位的密度矩陣 QND 風格的奇偶讀出來模擬有狀態模式，並使用一個輔助量子位和 Qiskit 交叉檢查。<lb/>對於無狀態模式，我們包括一個抽象的候選更新採樣器和一個電路級的 QAOA 風格的狀態向量採樣器，針對結構化的候選景觀，然後進行重置開銷敏感性分析。<lb/>最終框架將量子副駕駛定位為優化器側採樣、適配器或專家選擇、檢索、路由和推理路徑提議的有限信號生成器。<lb/>作為一種推測性的展望，我們介紹量子權重狀態副駕駛：在模型控制變量上受限的量子表示，而不是完整經典權重張量的直接編碼。
2605.18031.author: Y. Mo et.al.
